commit.message:
v2: Fix scraper extracting platform-level links instead of individual job URLs

Problem: v1's generic extractor grabbed navigation links ("产品与技术"),
category labels ("技术运营类"), and JD text fragments as job entries.
ByteDance returned 0 real jobs, Tencent had no URLs, MiniMax had 30+
duplicate fragments.

Fix:
- Add platform-specific extractors for Feishu, ByteDance, Tencent
- URL pattern filtering: only keep /position/{ID}, /job_detail/{ID} etc
- Click-through for SPA cards that use click handlers instead of <a> tags
- Auto-pagination (default 3 pages)
- Proper deduplication by URL or title
- Structured field extraction (title, location, department, jobType)

New difficulty section added to README (Difficulty #8).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: flush stdout/stderr before exit in CI to prevent lost output (#1022)

When process.exit(1) is called in non-TTY environments (like CI), Node buffers stdout/stderr to pipes. The process can terminate before these buffers are flushed to the runner, causing the job to fail with no visible output. Use setImmediate to defer exit by one tick so the event loop can flush buffered output before terminating.

Co-authored-by: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
refactor: EventHandler wrapper and Handle* → On* rename (#2460)

* refactor: introduce EventHandler<T> wrapper and rename Handle* to On*

This refactoring improves the consistency of the event handling API:

- Create EventHandler<TEvent> wrapper class to wrap Func<TEvent, ValueTask>
- Update AbstractWidget.InvokeEventAsync to unwrap EventHandler before processing
- Change all widget event properties from Func<Event<T>, ValueTask>? to EventHandler<Event<T>>?
- Rename all Handle* extension methods to On* (HandleClick→OnClick, HandleSubmit→OnSubmit, etc.)
- Update constructors to use EventHandler wrapper
- Add ToEventHandler() extension methods in Utils.cs
- Update all samples, tests, and documentation

The wrapper pattern allows extension methods to use the same name as event properties
(e.g., button.OnClick(handler) instead of button.HandleClick(handler)).

Note: MenuItem.HandleSelect is intentionally NOT renamed as it serves a different
purpose (setting OnSelect property) and is not a widget event handler.

Closes #2459

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: revert .releases history changes and add migration guide

- Revert changes to historical release notes (preserve history)
- Add EventHandler-Handle-to-On-Rename.md migration guide in 1.2.17

commit.message:
Fix null user race condition causing frozen matchmaking timer

Root cause (confirmed via Playwright mobile emulation test):
- Auth state change fires onAuthStateChanged with new user
- fetchUserData starts (async network call)
- If user logs out before fetchUserData resolves, lobby is set to
  visible but user state is null
- startMatchmaking() then throws 'Cannot read properties of null
  (reading uid)' — timer never starts, frozen at 0s

Fixes:
- Track currentAuthUid ref; abort fetchUserData callback if auth
  changed while it was in flight (prevents stale setView('lobby'))
- Add null guard at top of startMatchmaking() to prevent crash

Test: Playwright iPhone 13 emulation confirms both players match in
~1s with no console errors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix VE-13: load TTL from IMS when ContractData already in state from prior stage

Root cause: in parallel Soroban execution, a cluster's executor pre-loads
ContractData entries from prior_stage.entries (previous stage results).
When a prior-stage TX modified only the entry data (not the TTL), the TTL
was not included in prior_stage.entries. The early `continue` in
load_soroban_footprint when `state.get_entry(key).is_some()` skipped all
TTL loading, leaving state without a TTL for that entry.

is_archived_contract_entry then saw: entry in live state, get_ttl → None
→ treated as archived → EntryArchived for TXs that should succeed.

This regression was introduced by the O1 optimization (commit 22f37f3)
which added the early `continue` and replaced the pre-O1 behavior where
the TTL check happened independently of whether the entry was in state.

Fix: restructure load_soroban_footprint to always check whether the TTL
needs loading for ContractData/ContractCode keys, even when the entry
itself is already in state. When entry is in state but TTL is missing,
load the TTL from IMS (or bucket list as fallback) without reloading the
entry.

Also keep the Fix 2 from manager.rs: when a hot-archive-restored entry
appears as INIT but already exists in IMS, fall back to update so the
IMS TTL is refreshed (prevents stale expired TTL on subsequent ledgers).

Verified: L61349550 now matches mainnet (TXs 164-171 no longer fail with
EntryArchived). 20k ledger range 61340000-61360000 verifying.

Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
docs: add UTF-8 encoding fix for intermittent notification issue

Root cause: Windows PowerShell reads stdin as GBK by default,
but Claude Code sends UTF-8 JSON. Chinese characters in
last_assistant_message cause ConvertFrom-Json to fail silently.

Fix: Use StreamReader with UTF-8 encoding, and don't exit on
parse failure - send default notification instead.

commit.message:
feat: v2.59.6 — parameter tuner for XGBoost pipeline (grid/random search, CAGR-ranked)

- tuner.py: orchestrates 7-dim parameter search (WIN_THRESHOLD, BUY_MIN_LIFT,
  BUY_PROBABILITY_FLOOR, LEARNING_RATE, SUBSAMPLE, COLSAMPLE_BYTREE, TOP_N_FEATURES)
  - --stage signal: 48 focused combos (highest CAGR leverage)
  - --stage model: 108 model combos
  - --mode random: default 50 combos random search
  - --mode grid: full 5184-combo Cartesian with optional --dims filter
  - --resume: skip already-run combos from experiments_log.csv
  - Final output ranked by est_cagr with best-run detail
- stock_predictor_v5.py: TUNER_CFG JSON override block before Phase 0;
  est_cagr written to experiments_log row
- compare_experiments.py: est_cagr added to DISPLAY_COLS and numeric_hints

Add username login, admin user management, and improve accuracy engine

  - Tighter confidence calibration
  - Constraint: below 0.7 confidence → strongly prefer flat

- AMap REST API (if key configured)
- Nominatim/OSM as free fallback (Chinese language, no key needed)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix internal writeback worker racing against external writeback API

When no provider adapters are configured (provider-agnostic mode), the
internal writeback worker was processing all queued writebacks as
noop-successes, dequeuing items before external consumers could poll
them via /writeback/pending.

Add ExternalWritebackMode StoreOption that, when enabled, prevents
internal writeback workers from starting so items remain in the queue
for external services to poll and ACK. Enabled by default in production
via RELAYFILE_EXTERNAL_WRITEBACK env var.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
